name: Productivity Task Orchestration Dry Run
description: Validate a cross-tool productivity task plan and produce an approval-ready review package without calendar writes, meeting participation, email sends, browser actions, payments, or network access.

params.script: const raw = ctx.task_plan_raw; const text = typeof raw === 'string' ? raw : JSON.stringify(raw); const wrapped = text.match(/<untrusted-external[^>]*>\n?([\s\S]*?)\n?<\/untrusted-external>/); const plan = JSON.parse((wrapped ? wrapped[1] : text).trim()); if (plan?.kind !== 'productivity-task-plan') throw new Error('invalid productivity task plan kind'); if (plan?.execution?.mode !== 'dry_run' || plan?.execution?.external_effects_executed !== false) throw new Error('productivity task plan must be dry-run only'); if (!Array.isArray(plan.steps) || plan.steps.some((step) => step.execution_mode !== 'preview_only')) throw new Error('all productivity steps must remain preview_only'); return { kind: 'productivity-review-package', mission_id: ctx.mission_id, status: plan.approval?.required ? 'approval_required' : 'ready_for_local_draft', request: plan.request, domains: plan.domains, steps: plan.steps, approval: plan.approval, missing_inputs: plan.missing_inputs, evidence_plan: plan.evidence_plan, external_effects_executed: false };

params.message: Productivity task dry-run completed. Review: {{review_package_path}} Receipt: {{execution_receipt_path}}
